title: Era do Panado
description: New Gear, Dimensions, Magic, RPG, Dragons
body:
## ‼️QUESTS ARE NOW AVAILABLE - SCROLL DOWN TO "QUESTS"‼️

![era do panado logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31ef1d521323d72872a75dd4053916c4f5783772.png)

This modpack aims to transform your Minecraft experience by ramping up the difficulty and encouraging you to **gear up fast**!


---


## **🌍 Key Features 🌍**  
✨ **Increased Difficulty** ([SIHYWTCAMD](https://modrinth.com/mod/difficulty))

🏰 **NEW Dungeons & Structures** ([Moog's Voyager Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moogs-voyager-structures), [ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village), and more...)

☠️ 15 Bosses in total ([Bosses of Mass Destruction](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction), [AdventureZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/adventurez), and more...)

🌌 **New Dimensions** ([Eternal Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-starlight), [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether))

🐉 **Dragons (you can mount them)** ([Useless Reptile](https://modrinth.com/mod/useless-reptile))

🌿 **QOL changes**

🍚 **NEW Foods and Farms** ([Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated))

🪄 **RPG Classes (including Magic!)** ([RPG Series by ZsoltMolnarrr](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr))

⛵ **NEW Ships** ([Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships))

🛡️ **New Bosses** ([Bosses of Mass Destruction](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction))

🛋️ **Furniture Mods** 

🌐 **Server Optimized**

☀️ **Supports Shaders**


---
### ‼️NEW‼️ - Quests (Version 3.0.0 and above)

To enable quests in this modpack, please download the following mods separately.  
These mods are hosted on CurseForge, and all credit goes to their respective creators.  

- [FTB XMod Compat By FTB on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/api/v1/mods/889915/files/6048647/download)
- [FTB Quests (Fabric) By FTB on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/api/v1/mods/438496/files/6167038/download)
- [FTB Library (Fabric) By FTB on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/api/v1/mods/438495/files/6161174/download)
- [FTB Teams (Fabric) By FTB on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/api/v1/mods/438497/files/6119436/download)
- [Quests Kill Task Tweaks By MuonR on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/api/v1/mods/1161828/files/6003078/download)

**After dowloading the mods drop them on:**
```
ModrinthApp/profiles/Era do Panado/mods
```

---

**Why the name "A Era do Panado"?**
Panado stands for Breaded Steak in Portuguese.
This modpack was originally created for me and my friends to enjoy a cool modded experience, but later I thought it would be nice to realease it to the public so everyone else can enjoy it too!
